textAr: وَٱلطُّورِ
textEn: By the mount
textTranslit: Wat-Toor

textAr: وَكِتَـٰبٍ مَّسْطُورٍ
textEn: And [by] a Book inscribed
textTranslit: Wa kitaabim mastoor

textAr: فِى رَقٍّ مَّنشُورٍ
textEn: In parchment spread open
textTranslit: Fee raqqim manshoor

textAr: وَٱلْبَيْتِ ٱلْمَعْمُورِ
textEn: And [by] the frequented House
textTranslit: Wal baitil ma'moor

textAr: وَٱلسَّقْفِ ٱلْمَرْفُوعِ
textEn: And [by] the ceiling [i.e., heaven] raised high
textTranslit: Wassaqfil marfoo'

textAr: وَٱلْبَحْرِ ٱلْمَسْجُورِ
textEn: And [by] the sea set on fire,
textTranslit: Wal bahril masjoor

textAr: إِنَّ عَذَابَ رَبِّكَ لَوَٰقِعٌ
textEn: Indeed, the punishment of your Lord will occur.
textTranslit: Inna 'azaaba Rabbika lawaaqi'

textAr: مَّا لَهُۥ مِن دَافِعٍ
textEn: Of it there is no preventer.
textTranslit: Maa lahoo min daafi'

textAr: يَوْمَ تَمُورُ ٱلسَّمَآءُ مَوْرًا
textEn: On the Day the heaven will sway with circular motion
textTranslit: Yawma tamoorus samaaa'u mawraa

textAr: وَتَسِيرُ ٱلْجِبَالُ سَيْرًا
textEn: And the mountains will pass on, departing -
textTranslit: Wa taseerul jibaalu sairaa

textAr: فَوَيْلٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ لِّلْمُكَذِّبِينَ
textEn: Then woe, that Day, to the deniers,
textTranslit: Fawailuny yawma 'izil lil mukaazzibeen

textAr: ٱلَّذِينَ هُمْ فِى خَوْضٍ يَلْعَبُونَ
textEn: Who are in [empty] discourse amusing themselves.
textTranslit: Allazeena hum fee khawdiny yal'aboon

textAr: يَوْمَ يُدَعُّونَ إِلَىٰ نَارِ جَهَنَّمَ دَعًّا
textEn: The Day they are thrust toward the fire of Hell with a [violent] thrust, [its angels will say],
textTranslit: Yawma yuda'-'oona ilaa naari jahannama da'-'aa

textAr: هَـٰذِهِ ٱلنَّارُ ٱلَّتِى كُنتُم بِهَا تُكَذِّبُونَ
textEn: "This is the Fire which you used to deny.
textTranslit: Haazihin naarul latee kuntum bihaa tukazziboon

textAr: أَفَسِحْرٌ هَـٰذَآ أَمْ أَنتُمْ لَا تُبْصِرُونَ
textEn: Then is this magic, or do you not see?
textTranslit: Afasihrun haazaaaa am antum laa tubsiroon

textAr: ٱصْلَوْهَا فَٱصْبِرُوٓا۟ أَوْ لَا تَصْبِرُوا۟ سَوَآءٌ عَلَيْكُمْ ۖ إِنَّمَا تُجْزَوْنَ مَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ
textEn: [Enter to] burn therein; then be patient or impatient - it is all the same for you. You are only being recompensed [for] what you used to do."
textTranslit: Islawhaa fasbirooo aw laa tasbiroo sawaaa'un 'alaikum innamaa tujzawna maa kuntum ta'maloon

textAr: إِنَّ ٱلْمُتَّقِينَ فِى جَنَّـٰتٍ وَنَعِيمٍ
textEn: Indeed, the righteous will be in gardens and pleasure,
textTranslit: Innal muttaqeena fee jannaatinw wa na'eem

textAr: فَـٰكِهِينَ بِمَآ ءَاتَىٰهُمْ رَبُّهُمْ وَوَقَىٰهُمْ رَبُّهُمْ عَذَابَ ٱلْجَحِيمِ
textEn: Enjoying what their Lord has given them, and their Lord protected them from the punishment of Hellfire.
textTranslit: Faakiheena bimaaa aataahum rabbuhum wa waqaahum rabbuhum 'azaabal jaheem

textAr: كُلُوا۟ وَٱشْرَبُوا۟ هَنِيٓـًٔۢا بِمَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ
textEn: [They will be told], "Eat and drink in satisfaction for what you used to do."
textTranslit: Kuloo washraboo haneee 'am bimaa kuntum ta'maloon

textAr: مُتَّكِـِٔينَ عَلَىٰ سُرُرٍ مَّصْفُوفَةٍ ۖ وَزَوَّجْنَـٰهُم بِحُورٍ عِينٍ
textEn: They will be reclining on thrones lined up, and We will marry them to fair women with large, [beautiful] eyes.
textTranslit: Muttaki'eena 'alaa sururim masfoofatinw wa zawwaj naahum bihoorin 'een

textAr: وَٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَٱتَّبَعَتْهُمْ ذُرِّيَّتُهُم بِإِيمَـٰنٍ أَلْحَقْنَا بِهِمْ ذُرِّيَّتَهُمْ وَمَآ أَلَتْنَـٰهُم مِّنْ عَمَلِهِم مِّن شَىْءٍ ۚ كُلُّ ٱمْرِئٍۭ بِمَا كَسَبَ رَهِينٌ
textEn: And those who believed and whose descendants followed them in faith - We will join with them their descendants, and We will not deprive them of anything of their deeds. Every person, for what he earned, is retained.
textTranslit: Wallazeena aamanoo wattaba'at hum zurriyyatuhum bieemaanin alhaqnaa bihim zurriyyatahum wa maaa alatnaahum min 'amalihim min shai'; kullum ri'im bimaa kasaba raheen

textAr: وَأَمْدَدْنَـٰهُم بِفَـٰكِهَةٍ وَلَحْمٍ مِّمَّا يَشْتَهُونَ
textEn: And We will provide them with fruit and meat from whatever they desire.
textTranslit: Wa amdadnaahum bifaa kihatinw wa lahmim mimmaa yashtahoon

textAr: يَتَنَـٰزَعُونَ فِيهَا كَأْسًا لَّا لَغْوٌ فِيهَا وَلَا تَأْثِيمٌ
textEn: They will exchange with one another a cup [of wine] wherein [results] no ill speech or commission of sin.
textTranslit: Yatanaaza'oona feehaa kaasal laa laghwun feehaa wa laa taaseem

textAr: ۞ وَيَطُوفُ عَلَيْهِمْ غِلْمَانٌ لَّهُمْ كَأَنَّهُمْ لُؤْلُؤٌ مَّكْنُونٌ
textEn: There will circulate among them [servant] boys [especially] for them, as if they were pearls well-protected.
textTranslit: Wa yatoofu 'alaihim ghilmaanul lahum ka annahum lu'lu'um maknoon

textAr: وَأَقْبَلَ بَعْضُهُمْ عَلَىٰ بَعْضٍ يَتَسَآءَلُونَ
textEn: And they will approach one another, inquiring of each other.
textTranslit: Wa aqbala ba'duhum 'alaa ba'diny yatasaaa'aloon

textAr: قَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّا كُنَّا قَبْلُ فِىٓ أَهْلِنَا مُشْفِقِينَ
textEn: They will say, "Indeed, we were previously among our people fearful [of displeasing Allāh].
textTranslit: Qaalooo innaa kunnaa qablu feee ahlinaa mushfiqeen

textAr: فَمَنَّ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْنَا وَوَقَىٰنَا عَذَابَ ٱلسَّمُومِ
textEn: So Allāh conferred favor upon us and protected us from the punishment of the Scorching Fire.
textTranslit: Famannnal laahu 'alainaa wa waqaanaa 'azaabas samoom

textAr: إِنَّا كُنَّا مِن قَبْلُ نَدْعُوهُ ۖ إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلْبَرُّ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
textEn: Indeed, we used to supplicate Him before. Indeed, it is He who is the Beneficent, the Merciful."
textTranslit: Innaa kunnaa min qablu nad'oohu innahoo huwal barrur raheem

textAr: فَذَكِّرْ فَمَآ أَنتَ بِنِعْمَتِ رَبِّكَ بِكَاهِنٍ وَلَا مَجْنُونٍ
textEn: So remind, [O Muḥammad], for you are not, by the favor of your Lord, a soothsayer or a madman.
textTranslit: Fazakkir famaaa anta bini'mati rabbika bikaahininw wa laa majnoon

textAr: أَمْ يَقُولُونَ شَاعِرٌ نَّتَرَبَّصُ بِهِۦ رَيْبَ ٱلْمَنُونِ
textEn: Or do they say [of you], "A poet for whom we await a misfortune of time"?
textTranslit: Am yaqooloona shaa'irun natarabbasu bihee raibal manoon

textAr: قُلْ تَرَبَّصُوا۟ فَإِنِّى مَعَكُم مِّنَ ٱلْمُتَرَبِّصِينَ
textEn: Say, "Wait, for indeed I am, with you, among the waiters."
textTranslit: Qul tarabbasoo fa innee ma'akum minal mutarabbiseen

textAr: أَمْ تَأْمُرُهُمْ أَحْلَـٰمُهُم بِهَـٰذَآ ۚ أَمْ هُمْ قَوْمٌ طَاغُونَ
textEn: Or do their minds command them to [say] this, or are they a transgressing people?
textTranslit: Am taamuruhum ahlaamuhum bihaazaaa am hum qawmun taaghoon

textAr: أَمْ يَقُولُونَ تَقَوَّلَهُۥ ۚ بَل لَّا يُؤْمِنُونَ
textEn: Or do they say, "He has made it up"? Rather, they do not believe.
textTranslit: Am yaqooloona taqawwalah; bal laa yu'minoon

textAr: فَلْيَأْتُوا۟ بِحَدِيثٍ مِّثْلِهِۦٓ إِن كَانُوا۟ صَـٰدِقِينَ
textEn: Then let them produce a statement like it, if they should be truthful.
textTranslit: Falyaatoo bihadeesim misliheee in kaanoo saadiqeen

textAr: أَمْ خُلِقُوا۟ مِنْ غَيْرِ شَىْءٍ أَمْ هُمُ ٱلْخَـٰلِقُونَ
textEn: Or were they created by nothing, or were they the creators [of themselves]?
textTranslit: Am khuliqoo min ghairi shai'in am humul khaaliqoon

textAr: أَمْ خَلَقُوا۟ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ ۚ بَل لَّا يُوقِنُونَ
textEn: Or did they create the heavens and the earth? Rather, they are not certain.
textTranslit: Am khalaqus samaawaati wal ard; bal laa yooqinoon

textAr: أَمْ عِندَهُمْ خَزَآئِنُ رَبِّكَ أَمْ هُمُ ٱلْمُصَۣيْطِرُونَ
textEn: Or have they the depositories [containing the provision] of your Lord? Or are they the controllers [of them]?
textTranslit: Am'indahum khazaaa'inu rabbika am humul musaitiroon

textAr: أَمْ لَهُمْ سُلَّمٌ يَسْتَمِعُونَ فِيهِ ۖ فَلْيَأْتِ مُسْتَمِعُهُم بِسُلْطَـٰنٍ مُّبِينٍ
textEn: Or have they a stairway [into the heaven] upon which they listen? Then let their listener produce a clear authority [i.e., proof].
textTranslit: Am lahum sullamuny yastami'oona feehi falyaati mustami'uhum bisultaanim mubeen

textAr: أَمْ لَهُ ٱلْبَنَـٰتُ وَلَكُمُ ٱلْبَنُونَ
textEn: Or has He daughters while you have sons?
textTranslit: Am lahul banaatu wa lakumul banoon

textAr: أَمْ تَسْـَٔلُهُمْ أَجْرًا فَهُم مِّن مَّغْرَمٍ مُّثْقَلُونَ
textEn: Or do you, [O Muḥammad], ask of them a payment, so they are by debt burdened down?
textTranslit: Am tas'aluhum ajran fahum mim maghramim musqaloon

textAr: أَمْ عِندَهُمُ ٱلْغَيْبُ فَهُمْ يَكْتُبُونَ
textEn: Or have they [knowledge of] the unseen, so they write [it] down?
textTranslit: Am 'indahumul ghaibu fahum yaktuboon

textAr: أَمْ يُرِيدُونَ كَيْدًا ۖ فَٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ هُمُ ٱلْمَكِيدُونَ
textEn: Or do they intend a plan? But those who disbelieve - they are the object of a plan.
textTranslit: Am yureedoona kaidan fallazeena kafaroo humul makeedoon

textAr: أَمْ لَهُمْ إِلَـٰهٌ غَيْرُ ٱللَّهِ ۚ سُبْحَـٰنَ ٱللَّهِ عَمَّا يُشْرِكُونَ
textEn: Or have they a deity other than Allāh? Exalted is Allāh above whatever they associate with Him.
textTranslit: Am lahum ilaahun ghairul laa; subhaanal laahi 'ammaa yushrikoon

textAr: وَإِن يَرَوْا۟ كِسْفًا مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ سَاقِطًا يَقُولُوا۟ سَحَابٌ مَّرْكُومٌ
textEn: And if they were to see a fragment from the sky falling, they would say, "[It is merely] clouds heaped up."
textTranslit: Wa iny yaraw kisfam minas samaaa'i saaqitany yaqooloo sahaabum markoom

textAr: فَذَرْهُمْ حَتَّىٰ يُلَـٰقُوا۟ يَوْمَهُمُ ٱلَّذِى فِيهِ يُصْعَقُونَ
textEn: So leave them until they meet their Day in which they will be struck insensible -
textTranslit: Fazarhum hatta yulaaqoo yawmahumul lazee feehi yus'aqoon

textAr: يَوْمَ لَا يُغْنِى عَنْهُمْ كَيْدُهُمْ شَيْـًٔا وَلَا هُمْ يُنصَرُونَ
textEn: The Day their plan will not avail them at all, nor will they be helped.
textTranslit: Yawma laa yughnee 'anhum kaidumhum shai'anw wa laa hum yunsaroon

textAr: وَإِنَّ لِلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُوا۟ عَذَابًا دُونَ ذَٰلِكَ وَلَـٰكِنَّ أَكْثَرَهُمْ لَا يَعْلَمُونَ
textEn: And indeed, for those who have wronged is a punishment before that, but most of them do not know.
textTranslit: Wa inna lillazeena zalamoo 'azaaban doona zalika wa laakinna aksarahum laa ya'lamoon

textAr: وَٱصْبِرْ لِحُكْمِ رَبِّكَ فَإِنَّكَ بِأَعْيُنِنَا ۖ وَسَبِّحْ بِحَمْدِ رَبِّكَ حِينَ تَقُومُ
textEn: And be patient, [O Muḥammad], for the decision of your Lord, for indeed, you are in Our eyes [i.e., sight]. And exalt [Allāh] with praise of your Lord when you arise
textTranslit: Wasbir lihukmi rabbika fa innaka bi-a'yuninaa wa sabbih bihamdi rabbika heena taqoom

textAr: وَمِنَ ٱلَّيْلِ فَسَبِّحْهُ وَإِدْبَـٰرَ ٱلنُّجُومِ
textEn: And in a part of the night exalt Him and after [the setting of] the stars.
textTranslit: Wa minal laili fasabbihhu wa idbaaran nujoom
